claim: No Stable, release, real-time accuracy, complete conformance, manual assistive-technology, or distribution parity claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: named unordered list with visible person and status text
semantics.rolePolicy: Avatars are decorative because the adjacent name is authoritative.

keyboard.behavior: Static presence adds no focus stops; consumer-provided interactive avatar content remains consumer-owned.

nonColor: Every state is explicit visible text; border color and style are supplementary.
responsive: The list wraps and becomes a single column on narrow surfaces; logical layout supports RTL.
timePolicy: Stale derivation requires an explicit now value, avoiding hydration drift and making tests deterministic.
consumerResponsibilities: Own real-time transport, authentication, authorization and privacy.
Choose a truthful stale threshold and refresh policy.
Do not use presence for safety-critical availability or monitoring.
